welcomePage.title: Interactive Learning, Made Effortless
welcomePage.subtitle: Boost your learning efficiency with active recall. Upload study JSON files to dynamically render interactive cards, practice quizzes, timelines, and games. Statically built and local-first.
welcomePage.feat1Desc: No subscriptions, no accounts, and no paywalls. All learning progress and pages are processed locally in your browser for absolute speed and privacy.
welcomePage.feat2Desc: Study using 3D Flashcards, Matching games, Cloze tests, drag-and-drop Sorting, Fill-in-the-blank sentences, Tab comparisons, and multi-option Quizzes.
welcomePage.feat3Desc: Maximize memory retention using integrated practice/exam modes with automated timers, performance analytics, and a built-in focus Pomodoro timer.
welcomePage.uploadPrompt: Drag & drop a learning page JSON file here, or click to upload one from your computer.
welcomePage.aiPrompt: Don't have a JSON file? Generate one using AI:
welcomePage.shortcutHint2End: arrows to navigate between active pages

promptWizard.title: Prompt Wizard
promptWizard.questionTopic: What topic do you want to learn?
promptWizard.placeholderTopic: e.g., React Hooks, Photosynthesis, WW2 History
promptWizard.descTopic: Enter the subject you want to cover. The AI Chatbot will generate an uploadable JSON file with structured, interactive sections.
promptWizard.descChatbot: Or click below to copy & open directly in a Chatbot:

contextExplanations.Exam: Optimized for exam prep: focuses on core testing points, high-frequency definitions, common exam traps, and knowledge gaps that frequently appear in assessments.
contextExplanations.Academic: Focused on academic rigor: covers theoretical foundations, conceptual frameworks, research paradigms, historical evolution, and scholarly debates.
contextExplanations.Professional/Working: Practical and application-oriented: covers real-world scenarios, industry-standard workflows, professional decision-making, troubleshooting methods, and common anti-patterns.
contextExplanations.Daily Life: Casual and general understanding: covers everyday applications, practical know-how, common terminology, relatable analogies, and real-life problem-solving situations.
contextExplanations.Strategic: High-level overview and systems thinking: covers strategic frameworks, system interdependencies, long-term roadmaps, competitive landscapes, and high-level decision models.

depthExplanations.Low: A brief, high-level overview of the main topics. Best for a quick read, basic introduction, or a fast refresher.
depthExplanations.Medium: A balanced approach with core concepts, simple illustrations, and moderate detail. Suitable for most learners.
depthExplanations.High: An exhaustive deep-dive covering advanced mechanics, edge cases, underlying principles, nuanced exceptions, and comprehensive mastery-level knowledge. Best for full competency.

dashboard.title: Progress Dashboard
dashboard.emptyMessage: Upload a JSON file to get started!

pageContent.retryExamDesc: This will clear all your answers and reset the timer for this page. Your progress cannot be recovered.

pageContent.readyExam: Ready to review the learning material or practice the concepts?

pageContent.submitDetails: Make sure you've saved answers for all slides. After confirming, answers are locked and you can review them.

helpGuide.title: How to Use This App
helpGuide.step1Desc: This app makes learning interactive with 3D Flashcards, Matching Games, Cloze tests, drag-and-drop Sorting, Fill-in-the-blank sentences, and more. Every section auto-renders from your study JSON.
helpGuide.step2Desc: Click "Create JSON with Prompt Wizard" and follow the steps to describe your topic. Copy the prompt from the wizard and paste to a chatbot and get a ready-to-use JSON file for you to download.
helpGuide.step3Desc: Upload the downloaded JSON file. Then switch between 3 learning modes: Learn (browse), Practice (interactive with feedback), and Exam (timed, graded assessment).
helpGuide.step4Desc: Open the sidebar (☰ icon in the top bar) to view, reorder (drag & drop), mark pages as complete, or delete pages. Track your overall progress there.
helpGuide.step5Desc: Use the top bar to toggle Dark/Light theme, switch between English and Vietnamese, upload JSON files, or access the Dashboard for analytics.

feedback.title: Share Your Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve! Your feedback takes less than 1 minute.
